This test checks that signature-help documentation for an imported call renders
doc links using the declaration package and file context.

-- settings.json --
{
	"hoverKind": "FullDocumentation"
}

-- go.mod --
module example.com/sigdoclinksimport

go 1.20

-- sig.go --
package sigdoclinks

import "encoding/json"

type Value struct{}

// Encode marshals [Value] with [json.Marshal].
func Encode(v Value) ([]byte, error) {
	return json.Marshal(v)
}

-- caller/caller.go --
package caller

import "example.com/sigdoclinksimport"

func _() {
	sigdoclinks.Encode(sigdoclinks.Value{}) //@signature("Encode", "Encode(v sigdoclinks.Value) ([]byte, error)", -1, doc=EncodeDoc)
}

-- @EncodeDoc --
Encode marshals [Value](https://pkg.go.dev/example.com/sigdoclinksimport#Value) with [json.Marshal](https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/json#Marshal).
